title: SoulSoundWorld Initial Commit
summary: The SoulSoundWorld web build begins with the first committed landing-page foundation.

title: Landing Page Design + Manifesto Layer Formed
summary: The site evolves from a simple landing page into a more intentional brand surface with manifesto language, mood framing, and refined structure.

title: Funding Signal Added
summary: Support infrastructure begins to appear with creator-funding references added to the ecosystem.

title: Caption + Hashtag Generator Added
summary: Early creator-tooling layer added to support promotional output and artist workflow.

title: Live Sync / Chapter Tracking Layer Started
summary: Documentation and live-sync tracking begin appearing, connecting publishing progress to visible build records.

title: Story Tab + Pocket FM Linkage Added
summary: Narrative IP becomes part of the public site structure through story sections and Pocket FM connections.

title: SoulExpression Tool Layer Created
summary: The site expands beyond static presentation into usable creator tooling with SoulExpression interfaces and music-link support.

title: Tool Section Made Visible in Main Site
summary: Utility and interface layers are surfaced more clearly in the main website experience.

title: Music Section Refactor + SoundCloud Tool Cleanup
summary: Music-facing infrastructure is refined, improving presentation, structure, and tool readiness.

title: Tab Logic + Core Interface Stabilized
summary: Core navigation and tab-selection behavior are stabilized as the site becomes more system-like.

title: Crypto / Zora Profile Layer Added
summary: Web3 identity and artifact-facing links are integrated into the site, expanding SoulSoundWorld beyond music and story into ownership layers.

title: Frequency Stacking Canon System Added
summary: A full lore and systems layer is introduced through Frequency Stacking classes, worlds, factions, rules, artifacts, pressures, and player-sheet documentation.

title: Live Tab + Build Log Layer Added
summary: The public site begins to reflect active development and live ecosystem movement rather than static branding alone.

title: Streaming / Link Surface Expanded
summary: Music links, players, and platform routing are expanded, strengthening SoulSoundWorld as a multi-platform listening hub.

title: Depth of Samzin Kreave Page Created
summary: A deeper identity and narrative layer is added to the ecosystem through a dedicated founder-focused page and linked content.

title: Accelerator System Introduced
summary: The SoulSound Accelerator and related health, stats, opportunity, and revenue-analysis components are added, pushing the site toward dashboard-like ecosystem management.

title: Remember Who You Are Section Added
summary: A core philosophical identity section is added, strengthening the site’s emotional and ideological center.

title: Index Refactor for Clarity + New Features
summary: The main homepage architecture is reworked to improve coherence, navigation, and ecosystem readability.

title: Vault, Social World, and Intake Structures Added
summary: The ecosystem expands into multiple world-specific pages and intake structures, increasing internal modularity.

title: SoulSound v0 Live Page Created
summary: A dedicated live-page structure is introduced, supporting a more active presentation of the build.

title: SoulSound Signal Generator Added
summary: A specialized signal-generation tool is added, reinforcing the site’s role as a creator operating system rather than just a destination.

title: Frequency Stacking Lite Interface Created
summary: A lighter UI and logic layer for Frequency Stacking is created, making the canon system more interactable.

title: SoulSound Studio Hero Image Integrated
summary: Visual branding is upgraded with the SoulSound studio image added and organized into live assets.

title: Live Test Section Pushed from Termux
summary: The mobile-first build pipeline is publicly proven through direct Termux-to-GitHub live deployment activity.

title: Observer Interface Finalized
summary: The Observer Interface and homepage entry are finalized, marking a stable activation point for the live ecosystem.

title: Signal Records Tab Added
summary: A dedicated entry point for build-proof records is added to the main site navigation.

title: Signal Records Page Created
summary: A standalone Signal Records page is created to display structured ecosystem milestones publicly.

title: Signal Records Data Layer Created
summary: A dedicated entries.json file is added to power the Signal Records system dynamically.

title: Skool Community Connected
summary: The community layer is connected back into the main site through the Join the Signal button, tightening the ecosystem loop.

title: Signal Records Render Path Fixed
summary: The fetch path for Signal Records is corrected, allowing the page to render live milestone cards from the JSON data source.

title: Proof of Resonance Layer Activated
summary: Signal Records goes live as a public proof layer linking build actions, GitHub history, and visible ecosystem evolution.
